game.title: TIVT
game.short_text: Hard obstacle dodging game.

details.title: TIVT
details.description:
Read this before playing!
Controls:
Arrows/WASD: MoveZ/Shift/Space: Slow down bullets, with a consequence: the game window will shrink, this can be both detrimental or used to your advantage.ESC: Pause.Backspace: Return to level select from pause menu.M: Toggle music on/off.
The game should work with a gamepad connected in the first slot, but I recommend keyboard control.
You start the game with 3 levels unlocked, so you're free to skip a couple levels in order to progress. Clear all 20 standard stages to access the final level.

A GAME BY:sarnThank you to my friends who helped test and provide feedback:Oroshibu, echoduck, valentines, Valentine, squp, NickMade for Bullet Hell Jam 5. The jam theme ("consequences") inspired the time-slow screen shrinking mechanic.

details.title: The Flower's Curse
details.description:
The Flower's Curse
Join me on a one-of-a-kind adventure as a flower with a special gift – or rather, a curse. Let's call it an "Aqua Curse" which has been passed down through the ages and ensures I avoid water at all costs: no getting wet, no sipping from puddles, nothing.
But here's the twist: this curse can actually work in your favor! As we journey on, you'll discover ways to leverage this peculiarity to snag some amazing upgrades. So, let's make the most of being an awkward, water-shy flower and see where this adventure takes us!
How to Play:
Move left/right using your arrow keys (a/d)Click on the card to take upgrade

Upgrade System:
Combine upgrades in strategic ways to gain an advantage, but remember that all upgrades come with costs and consequences. As you progress through the game, you'll need to weigh the benefits of upgrading against the potential drawbacks. Will you sacrifice some power for greater sustainability, or opt for a single powerful upgrade that comes at a steep cost?

Check out the manual for more information on enemies, scoring, and story!

game.title: HEATBREAKER
game.short_text: Turn up the heat by shooting enemies as close as you can!

details.title: HEATBREAKER
details.description:
Unleash havoc on enemies in HEATBREAKER, a small arcade-style shoot-em up inspired by classic arcade games!
Made for the Bullet Hell Jam V!
As a consequence of your destruction, your HEAT gauge (the one on the left) will rise. The higher your rank, the higher your score multiplier!Getting up close to enemies while killing them increases it faster!Use your Break when its charged to further boost the HEAT gauge!

game.title: Match Made in Bullet Hell
game.short_text: A unique and frantic "dual-screen game" that combines match 3 and bullet hell gameplay.

details.title: Match Made in Bullet Hell
details.description:
A unique and frantic "dual-screen game" that combines match 3 and bullet hell gameplay.   Juggle two games and escape hell — match gems to defeat enemies while dodging a flurry of neon-bullets coming your way.
Each side of the game creates consequences for the other side. Matching gems attacks enemies, and getting hit fills the board with blockers that stop you from matching. 
Controls
WASD - MoveHold Shift - Slow MoveClick and Drag - Swap and match gemsEsc - Pause
You must choose 3 colours of enemies that you can attack at the start of the game.
Match 3 gems to attack a random enemy of the same colour. You cannot attack enemies that are not of your chosen colours.Match 4 to spawn a colour bomb, which clears all gems of the same colour (and attack enemies).Match 5 to trigger a special laser attack that hits enemies of all colours.
A game by RATH (RATHSOFT) made in 10 days for Bullet Hell Jam 5 — Ranked #7 overall.

details.title: Absolute Reflex

Absolute Reflex is a Classic Bullet Hell showdown, but you can STOP TIME at any point and TELEPORT to safety! Though if you want to try for the score, refrain yourself.
A game by Jukio Kallio, art by Felix
Made for Bullet Hell Jam V in 6 days. It was voted #1 in 'Audio' and 'Fun' categories, and #9 in the 'Overall.' Thank you so much!

game.title: Void Call
game.short_text: A caravan-shmup where the more you kill, the more will spawn. Embrace the Chaos, Embrace the Void

details.title: Void Call
details.description:
"Void Call" is a retro-styled bullet hell made for the "Bullet Hell Jam 5" This game was made by LouieChapm and Lokistriker, with special help from Epicheezeness.

"This is your last chance" and yet I didn't care. 
The Prototype "R0-Z" was fell into the hands of "MAGNUM CA", a space paramilitary company whos interest oppose the company I worked for. I've been informed this prototype is the first working version of a time machine, a powerful weapon in anyone's hands. 
My job is to steal it. My mission, well... My mission is my own.
 I tire of these companies use that us as pawns in their little game and I've grown tired of this empty hellhole I hold no ties to. I wont let them have it and I don't care use it. I'll let the void take it. 

Z - Fire X - Focus mode C - Energy blade Arrows Keys - Movement 
Time a directional input after being hit to animation cancel the hit stun and redirect yourself

Killing green enemies with your energy blade ( secondary fire )  calls in reinforcements, giving you more enemies to kill, and more XP to gain.Killing enemies drops XP. Gather enough and your main gun will improve. Your multiplier increases 1x for each level you have.Each enemy killed adds 0.01x to your multiplier, capping out at 0.99xPoint blank enemies to recieve more score
Max out the level, and enemy killing multipliers ( indicated bottom L and R ) to go into a hyper scoring mode!

Special thanks to Epicheezeness for the amazing work on the final animation and on the black hole renders and to Short_Demand for some illuminating early playtesting. Thanks as well to the Lazy Devs Academy Community and the Shmups Junkie's Community, to Krystman and to Aktane.

game.title: HELLCUBED
game.short_text: Bullet Hell Arena FPS with a Survivors-style upgrade system

details.title: HELLCUBED
details.description:
HELLCUBED is a Bullet Hell Arena FPS with a Survivors-style upgrade system made for the 2024 Bullet Hell Jam in 10 days. It placed 9th for Fun.
You wear a hi-tech mech suit with a powerful projectile weapon and various abilities including boosted movement, flying, self repair and a shield. However everything except basic ground movement consumes Energy. Destroy the enemy machines to collect the Energy they drop and replenish your reserves. You also gain XP from destroying enemies enabling you to choose an upgrade for your mech each time you level up. Can you survive 15 waves?
A successful run takes a little over 15 minutes.
FIREFOX USERS: Please note that if you toggle fullscreen using the Enter key whilst in first person (i.e. the mouse is captured) the mouse will be released and you will need to left click again to recapture it.

This version of the game includes various fixes and minor enhancements compared to the version originally submitted to the jam. You can play the original jam version here and there is a post here detailing what changed between the versions.

CONTROLS
WASD : MOVE
MOUSE : LOOK
LMB : FIRE
WASD + SHIFT : BOOST MOVE
SPACE : HOLD TO ASCEND
F : TOGGLE HOVER MODE
R : HOLD TO REPAIR
RMB : HOLD TO SHIELD
P : TOGGLE PAUSE

OPTIONS
ENTER : TOGGLE FULLSCREEN
M : TOGGLE MUSIC
O : TOGGLE PROXIMITY ALERT SOUND
I : INVERT MOUSE
8 : DECREASE MOUSE SENSITIVITY
9 : INCREASE MOUSE SENSITIVITY
0 : RESET MOUSE SENSITIVITY TO DEFAULT

MY PLAYTHROUGH OF THE GAME ON YOUTUBE
Tested in Chrome, Firefox and Edge on Windows 10. I don't think this will work on Mac.

game.title: HeartKeepers
game.short_text: Visual Novel x Bullet Hell - Flourish the Relationship, protect the H.E.A.R.T.!

details.title: HeartKeepers
details.description:
HeartKeepers - the One and Only Dating Agency for Extraordinary Couples.
Welcome, Agent. Our world has gone through a lot - Economical and Climate Changes, Famines, Multiverse Collisions, failed Instrumentality Projects, Magical Girl resurgences, Extraterrestrial Invasions...
Our Agency is United in one goal - let's Unite our Entire World.
With all the various species of humanoids forced to live together, conflict is bound to break out. But with our H.E.A.R.T. technology - we have a chance to finally erase the boundary between humans, half-humans, magic wielders, youkai, aliens, demons, angels and eldritch horrors, one unlikely couple at a time. 
Let us change this chaotic world for the better. Your first contract will involve helping a Pure Human client build their relationship with a Cat Girl. Whether you're a Newbie or an experienced H.E.A.R.T. Handler, this is what you should expect while working with us:
Prolonged, phase-based missions where you oversee the relationship between your Client and their interspecies date;First phase, Visual Novel - observe the client's interactions during dates and help them make decisions.Second phase, ACTION - connect to the client's H.E.A.R.T. directly and avoid the stress (bullets) at all costs.Decisions that will have consequences. Successful handling of the First phase is known to positively affect the Second phase in 99.8% of observed cases.An opportunity to gain invaluable dating experience to adapt to our rapidly shifting world.As a bonus - an atmospheric soundtrack will be deployed rhythmically to help you get in the zone during each mission.
Good luck, Agent. And remember: 
LOVE comes from the H.E.A.R.T.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Made with SHMUP Creator, for Bullet Hell Jam V. Due to various reasons, the game ended up quite far from a complete experience, but we hope you enjoy it regardless. 
Brought to you by Aru, Cybershroom (MagnaRemora), MiaCake and betetiro. Download the Read Me (Please).txt for the full list of credits.
Known issues:
Highscore board appears at the end or after game over, despite the game not keeping any score.Clicking through lines of dialogue quickly can make new lines appear before the old ones stopped typing.Some lines of dialogue can be longer than their textbox. Please report when that happens.Heartbeat effect during ACTION segments goes off-sync after dying and respawning.(Not confirmed) Rotating bullet patterns may work differently on different monitor framerates, e.g. they may take sharper turns on 60fps than on 144fps.

game.title: CODENAME: Full Metal Heroes
game.short_text: A 90s action movie inspired top-down bullet-hell shooter​

details.title: CODENAME: Full Metal Heroes
details.description:
Grab a weapon and shoot your way through the gangsters who attacked a police tower to reach the top floor and the boss.
CODENAME: Full Metal Heroes is a 90s action movie inspired top-down bullet-hell shooter with several different weapons, different enemies, challenging shootouts and consequences.
While driving around the city, doing your job as an officer,  you get  a call from Captain Riker. The police station was attacked by the  wanted criminal Minigun Gunther. You are nearby and it's your duty to take on this mission.


Utilize an arsenal of weapons to defeat the enemies on each floor.

Save the hostages to get some money you can spend on item shops.

Don' get hit by bullets.

bullets - a lot of bullets11 floors of actionsdifferent weapon types and weaponsdifferent enemies and movesetsshop items giving you buffssave hostatges - DO NOT KILL THEM!a difficult boss to challenge

details.title: Neon Meow
details.description:
60-second bullet-meow game. It was developed in 10 days for Bullet Hell Jam 5. 

The theme is consequences: you could eliminate (but not evade) bullets, but this raises the alert level that creating more invulnerable bullets. What is your choice?

Credit

game.title: Ent-ropy
game.short_text: Bullet-Hell Squirrel Survival

details.title: Ent-ropy
details.description:
As a squirrel, you need to collect enough nuts to survive the winter, unfortunately you decided to settle down in an enchanted forest full of living trees called Ents.
The Ents attack you with nuts which you can collect up to 20 at a time before needing to bring them back to your house for storage. If you get hit before you make it back, you will drop 40% of all held nuts, don't get too greedy.
You can also plant more Ents to make collecting nuts easier, but getting too many may make it hard to handle.
 With the shop, you can buy different upgrades to make collecting nuts easier, but make sure you don't overspend! You still need enough for winter.
Controls:

WASD or arrow keys for movementSpace to rollEscape brings you back to the menu and you can press start to continue
You may be able to survive the winter, but can you find all 6 endings?
Created for the Bullet Hell Jam 2024. Hope you enjoy!

resultData.title: HELLSHOT KILLBLADE: ~TURN TO DUST; SHOT TO DEATH~

game.title: HELLSHOT KILLBLADE: ~TURN TO DUST; SHOT TO DEATH~
game.short_text: CRUMBLE AWAY AND FADE TO ASH, REMOVED FROM THE CYCLE OF SAMSARA AND FREED OF REINCARNATION

details.title: HELLSHOT KILLBLADE: ~TURN TO DUST; SHOT TO DEATH~
details.description:
Made for Bullet Hell Game Jam V, this was created for those into chuunibyou aesthetics, whether ironically or unironically. This game combines the classic bullet hell gameplay with the simple idea of "What if there was a style gauge and a parry button?" Here, your style is your health- drop below D and you'll meet your doom and desolation! Gain style shooting the enemy and by parrying right at the moment a bullet would hit you! Be careful though- mistime the parry and pay the consequences!
Meet all the characters in HELLSHOT KILLBLADE: ~TURN TO DUST; SHOT TO DEATH~!  They're all super cool!

Get Stylish! The parry mechanic is the bomb mechanic! The higher the style, the more bullets cleared! The higher the style, the stronger your attacks! Choose to use your parry offensively at a higher risk, or save it for defensive emergencies! Both will have consequences!


Take a small reading break! There's always more bullets to come back to!

Try out some patterns! Don't get hit! Hold shift to focus, but focus too long and you'll be locked out of it! The sword on your back means you can parry! If it disappears, it means your parry is on cooldown until it comes back!

Get ready for some fancy shootin'!

Arrow Keys: Movement
Shift: Focus (Bullet spread changes, hurt box becomes visible, and speed lowers for better control)
Z: Shoot
X: Parry
Esc: Pause/Skip Cutscenes

Made by:
@LunaShiba: Art and Programming
@Zanamaoria: Art
@KenDatta: Programming
@danbo7: Programming
@Jifuwabe_art: Artzokzok: Music

game.title: The last void keeper
game.short_text: A bullet hell about consequences and aqua

details.title: The last void keeper
details.description:
There is heavy problems with balance so don't blame your skills, am sorry :(
Controls      (READ IMPORTANT as there is no tutorial) 
[HOLD CLICK] ON CARDS UPGRADES OR CANCEL BUTTON WHEN ON THE UPGRADE MENU
Right Click - Shoot a hook to zoom in on entities (Because of the short water range, or, to throw enemies into the spikes) HOLD SPACEBAR and LEFT CLICK when on RANGE(when the arrow is not red) - Throw a crystal to capture Spirits or hold down to select the spirit to release (LOWER ICONS OF DEMONS)  E - Consume a spirit to obtain its essence. When the consumed spirit has been already captured it would free the space to capture another new enemy.  SHIFT - Dash Left Click - Shoot water from the orb to turn enemies or to feed spirits. Movement - W,A,S,D or Arrow keys 
Objective:
The main objective should be to capture enemies after turning them “blue”(and when they start shooting yellow rather than red) by throwing a crystal with the SPACEBAR and then deploy them as turrets.
The converted enemies drop more essence! so is usually a good idea to convert them since it usually gives twice the amount that was consumed(unless missed a lot of shots)
Capture Spirit:

Deploy Spirit:




Credits:
A bullet hell made in 10 days for 2 jams that overlaped eachother, Bullet Hell Jam 5 and Pixel Game Jam - 2024. 
Everything(graphics, mechanics, programming, etc) was made solo (https://nikoze.itch.io/) with the following exeptions:
Fonts:
https://www.dafont.com/microserif.font
https://www.dafont.com/piacevoli.font
https://www.dafont.com/typecast.font
The 3 songs(Main menu, Action and Waiting) were generated with online tools.
Aqua
The player embodies an entity with the ability to manipulate the essence of life, which is water in its purest state. While more abilities focused on the states of water (such as freezing or boiling) were envisioned, time constraints prevented their implementation.

Consequences
Consequences are the results of your decisions. In this game, you must make numerous decisions that are closely tied to your effectiveness in passing each round and wave. For every spirit you choose to deploy, more projectiles will fill the screen, but enemies will die faster.
END
I wish I had more time, as I could add many more elements, and balance the ones that are already in, but that's a future maybe.

game.title: Rebound
game.short_text: A Bullet Hell In Which Your Biggest Enemy Is Yourself

details.title: Rebound
details.description:
Your bullets are your biggest enemy. Every shot you miss will bounce back and might even hit you while you least expect it. Be mindful of your shots.
Gameplay:
Shoot your way through tougher and tougher waves of enemies while also upgrading your stats along the way. Collect powerful upgrades that with improper use might hinder your performance.
Story:
Ray Rebound has found himself stranded on a desolate alien planet after his space ride ran out of juice. Now he must fight through countless robotic aliens in hopes of finding a way off the planet.
Controls:
WASD - Move the player.SHIFT (While Moving) - Dash.MOUSE - Look around, shoot invisaray.ESCAPE - Pause menu.
Made for the bullet hell game jam 5 in the duration of 10 days.

moreInfo.Author: Zelger98
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Aliens, Bullet Hell, Fast-Paced, Pixel Art, Robots, Singleplayer, Third Person, Top down shooter

game.title: Chests and Bullets
game.short_text: Action-packed bullet hell with mind-bending puzzles

details.title: Chests and Bullets
details.description:
Chest And Bullets
This game was originally made for the Bullet Hell Jam 5.
Fight waves of thrilling enemies and solve mind-bending puzzles in this action-packed game! Before each level you'll have the chance to open chests,  but beware,  as two of them are impostors! Use the clues they give you to figure out which two chests are lying and open all the chests which are telling the truth. If you open up the wrong chest, there will be consequences. This consequence will make your life harder when dodging bullets and battling enemies. This is a hard game, so you will likely need many attempts to beat it. The puzzles are randomly generated so each playthrough is unique!
Game developed by Jan666
Music by AlexBamZ
Original Song
Hope you enjoy!You can play in the browser or download files for better performance.
If you decide to download, unzip the folder and run the unity "Bullet hell" executable. 
You might encounter a popup telling you it could be malicious but trust me, it's not a virus.

game.title: Conchsequences
game.short_text: Roll up your sleeves and flex those mussels. But don't get too salty.

details.title: Conchsequences
details.description:
Time for a plunge! Board your submarine and take on the monstrous trench of 'Conchsequences,' a  top-down pixel bullet hell.

Developed for Bullet Hell Jam V.

Wave-based Bullet FighterToggle Difficulty, Easy & Hard ModeImmortal BulletsPlayer Bullet Upgrades & Stat BoostsAnimated EnemiesOriginal SoundtrackSupported Language: English

"Miss The Shot and Face the Conchsequences"
Every missed bullet will bounce around the arena and evolve into special bullets such as Homing missiles, Explosive, and more - making the arena swimmingly chaotic to navigate around.  Strategize your build and use them to your advantage to turn the tide! 

Controls
Move - WASDDash - SpaceShoot - Mouse left click

Production/Project Management
DeadShotNinja (Vitaliy): Project Manager
--

Game Design
danystark: Lead Game Designer: Concept, Theme, Gameplay & Mechanics
Danny S: Combat Designer, System Designer, Game Designer
--

Programming

2D Art

Con Ray: Creature Design, Concept Art
Pauline Reinacher: Creature Design, Pixel Animation, UI Art, Key Art, itch.io Page FormatRex Beck:  UI Arttoffl: Technical Art, Environment Art, Animation, VFX
--
Audio Design
Antongiulio Giardino: Sound Designer, Composer
Lisette Amago: Sound Designer, Composer
--

Thank you so much for playing! Let us know your thoughts and of any bugs below.

game.title: Misunderstoodman
game.short_text: A short bullet hell

details.title: Misunderstoodman
details.description:
The game was made for the Bullet Hell Jam 2024.
Shoot aliens but don't shoot people from the Earth. There are 4 different final bosses and 5 endings to find out.
2 player mode : 
- first player : WASD or IJKL to move, CTRL to shoot,
- second player : arrow keys to move, SHIFT to shoot (available in single player too)

The sound effects and music come from third parties.
Sound effects : 
- The Essential Retro Video Game Sound Effects Collection  by Juhani Junkala (SubspaceAudio) - public domain - https://opengameart.org/content/512-sound-effects-8-bit-style
- Horror Sound Effects Library  by Little Robot Sound Factory - CC-BY 3.0 - https://opengameart.org/content/horror-sound-effects-library
- Meows and Roar from Pixabay : https://pixabay.com/fr/sound-effects/search/meow/
Music : 
- Superhero by CleytonKauffman : https://cleytonkauffman.bandcamp.com/track/superhero
- menu and tutorial music by rezoner : https://opengameart.org/users/rezoner
- 3 boss tunes from A bag of chips by Zane Little : https://zanelittle.bandcamp.com/
- Moonlit Rabbit's Midnight Periapsis by celestialghost : https://opengameart.org/content/moonlit-rabbits-midnight-periapsis
Unzip the folder and run launcher.bat.

moreInfo.Author: CryptRat
moreInfo.Tags: Bullet Hell, Local Co-Op, Local multiplayer, Shoot 'Em Up

game.title: Magic of Consequences
game.short_text: Bullet Hell Jam 5 Game created by Mateusz "Arssin" Binięda

details.title: Magic of Consequences
details.description:
Hello!
Can you defeat the demon magician? Are you lucky and skilled enough?... Take on the role of a little magician and don't care as long as you have fun, even for a moment!
Magic of Consequences is a bullet hell game created for Bullet Hell Jam 5, which also contains elements from other game genres. Defeat your opponents, survive enough time, or collect items and then choose the right door that will allow you to achieve the best time.
The game has a touch of humor when it comes to the possibility of drawing two of the same doors or some "hardcore" choices.
There are currently 8 levels.
Game, assets and music created by Mateusz "Arssin" Binięda. Game made in GODOT.
Controls:
MOVEWSAD/ARROWSINTERACTEAIMMOUSEATTACKLEFT MOUSE
Credentials:
Bullethell engine : BulletUpHell by Dark PeaceUnfortunately, the version is only available for download on Windows (theoretically I could also switch to Linux -> but I have no way to check at the moment).
Initially, there was supposed to be a web version, but due to technical problems with weaker devices, I had to withdraw it.

game.title: Tinker Toy Tanks
game.short_text: A bullet hell fused with a bullet heaven.

details.title: Tinker Toy Tanks
details.description:
made for the Bullet hell game jam 5No upgrades in this game comes without any consequences...

Dive into Tinker Toy Tanks, an arcade shooter where every blessing brings a curse - strengthening your foes, whether it be the standard Red Strikers, who shoot straight bullets, the Green Octopus, which shoot spiraling bullets, or the Blue Surfer, who shoot wavy bullets. Dodge bullets tactfully and remember, when you pause shooting, you start healing.
Controls :WASD - Movement
Left mouse click : shootF4 - fullscreenR - restart

moreInfo.Author: MONO LISA
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Arcade, Bullet Hell, Pixel Art, Shoot 'Em Up

game.title: Bullets Are Expensive
game.short_text: A bullet hell game for a game jam

details.title: Bullets Are Expensive
details.description:
A simple game created for a Bullet Hell game jam, with the special theme "Consequences."
In this game you start with woefully insufficient ammo, so  you must steal more from the enemies trying to kill you by flying near the attacks without hitting them. Only the boss needs to be killed, and score will be based solely on your remaining ammunition and health.
KBM Controls:
WASD or arrow keys to moveLeft click or Z to fire bulletsRight-click or X to fire bombsHold shift to move slightly slower
Controller:
Left stick to moveCircle to fire bulletsTriangle to fire bombsHold L1 to move slightly slowerX to confirm menu selections
Credits:BGM, SFX - Azina/AzisareBackground Art - Azina/AzisarePlaytesting - Azina/Azisare, KernelDCoding, Art, Design, etc - KernelDGithub Link: https://github.com/ClDumbass/BulletsAreExpensiveNOTE: I do not intend to develop this project further as it was just for a game jam. Bullet hell is not on my list of preferred genres, but I wanted some dev practice.
